nasb.text: He said, “Which way shall we go up?” And he answered, “The way of the wilderness of Edom.”

esv.text: Then he said, “By which way shall we march?” Jehoram answered, “By the way of the wilderness of Edom.”

cnv.text: 約沙法問：“我們從哪條路上去呢？”約蘭回答：“從以東曠野的路上去。”

ccb.text: 我们从哪一条路进攻呢？”约兰答道：“从以东的旷野。”
